name: Russ Feingold
subject: Election Day is closer than you think
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Now is the time to join us. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea7/2201812993/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'm writing to you tonight because you've been supporting my campaign for a while, but haven't yet made a contribution. Election Day is just about two months away, and we're in the home stretch. Now's the time to step up and make your first contribution. We're running a grassroots campaign -- one that you can be proud of. I've been to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once, putting more than 56,000 miles on our campaign van. We're putting every dollar contributed back into our voter contact program -- getting our message out to voters in every corner of Wisconsin. All we need now is for you to join us. **[Join my campaign. Make your first contribution of $3 today and help us reach our $150,000 goal by midnight tomorrow, August 31.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea7/2201812993/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea7/2201812993/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea7/2201812993/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$3 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea4/2201812993/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=3")

---
The stakes couldn't be higher. My opponent, Republican Senator Ron Johnson, has aligned himself with Donald Trump and refuses to denounce his extremist rhetoric. Senator Johnson believes that pay equity legislation for women does more harm than good, and recently suggested that we replace college professors with videotapes of PBS documentaries -- _despite the fact that he's supported defunding PBS._
If Senator Johnson actually listened to Wisconsinites, he'd know how out of step his views are with his constituents. But he's too busy listening to his right-wing bosses like the Koch brothers. He's been called their "model legislator," and they're not going to give up this Senate seat without a fight. That's why _ten_ right-wing groups have already spent millions on Johnson's behalf.
**I'm running a different kind of campaign, one that starts and ends with listening to everyday Wisconsinites. But I can't do it alone. Now is the perfect time for you to make your first contribution and help us reach our goal.**
**[Join my campaign. Contribute $3 today to help us reach our $150,000 goal by midnight tomorrow?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44b4/1c469400/77d188e/3575ea7/2201812993/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&refcode=ema_2016-08-30_EOMRDFND_nd-3&utm_campaign=EOMRDFND&utm_medium=ema")**
I'm so proud of the campaign we're running, and I hope you'll feel that same pride when you contribute. Thank you for standing with me today.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

| We won, friend! I'm so honored to earn the Democratic nomination to be Florida's next U.S. Senator.

I just walked off the stage, and I couldn't wait to share this moment with you. This victory is thanks to your grassroots support, and I'm so proud of the movement we've built together. Thank you for being a part of this.

But this is just the beginning of our fight. Floridians deserve a Senator who will show up and work hard for them -- and that's not Marco Rubio. Patrick

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Heading into the home stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Labor Day is almost here.

Dear Friend,

In just a few days, we will celebrate Labor Day with family and friends.

Together, we’ll celebrate the working men and women who have built our country and propel our economy.

It is a significant holiday with even greater significance in an election year. The long weekend traditionally marks the start of the home stretch toward Election Day. Voting starts in just 52 days, so it is critical that we continue strengthening our winning ground game.

That’s why I am coming directly to you to ask for your help. Building a people-powered campaign worthy of our state -- and the stakes we face this election year -- takes resources. It takes having all of us invest in a better future for our state.

Can you make a contribution before midnight tomorrow? We need to raise $20,000 to ensure we have what it takes to win.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Or donate another amount: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=OTQzODYzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgyNTI4MDM4S0&mt=1&rt=0

By supporting our campaign now, you are making a direct investment in expanding our grassroots outreach: more organizers, better targeted data, and more offices in communities near you.

We are working hard in every part of the state. Now is the time for us to double and triple our efforts. With so much at stake, we can’t afford to let up.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

subject: I don’t want to have to make those choices, Derek.
body:
We could have to make some hard choices. | Derek --

With this monthly deadline coming up at midnight tonight, I wanted to update you on how we’re doing:

Since we set our $10 million goal, we’ve raised nearly $7.5 million with the help of grassroots supporters. That’s a good start, but we have a long way to go -- **[can you help out with a donation to get a free sticker?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzNzkxMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1Mzg0NTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If we don’t hit our goal, we’ll have to pick and choose where we funnel our resources in the 10 weeks we have left.

So one day next month, a field office never opens; the week after that, a team of organizers never gets hired; in October, a new ad never runs.

I don’t want to have to make those choices, Derek. But we just won't have other options if we finish this month raising less money than we need.

So this is your chance to step up and say that you’re really, truly with Hillary and ready to win. **We’re looking for 18 donations from your area before midnight tonight to hit our final daily projection -- make one right now, and make sure we hit our goal:**

Robby

Have you noticed that Greg Gianforte has stopped pretending to talk about the important issues facing Montanans and is instead going straight into the gutter with vicious attack ads and misleading fear-mongering mailers?

| Guys -- We did it. Patrick is the Democratic nominee for Florida's Senate seat.

**But now the real fight begins.** From today until November 8th, every moment matters. The strength of our support before the general election will be a huge test of our campaign's organization in our battle against Marco Rubio.

body:

---
Hi Friend,

I came to work on Evan's campaign because he is truly the best candidate to represent Hoosiers like me. At a time when extremism and gridlock are par for the course in Washington, Evan has the experience, common sense, and determination to break through and craft meaningful solutions.

He did it as governor -- by working across the aisle, finding common ground, and always prioritizing what's best for Hoosiers.

As Evan's Finance Director, it's my job to keep an eye on the money. And I'm here to tell you that the election is just 10 weeks away. **If we want to elect Evan, then we have to hit every one of our fundraising goals -- including the one coming tonight at midnight.**

**[Will you pitch in just $5 to elect the only candidate in this race with a record of getting things done for Hoosiers?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5046b/7be36b49/1ef6af59/78f88174/1148638305/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-august-eom2?refcode=20160831nd&amount=10")**

Evan's record speaks for itself. As governor, he cut taxes, created a scholarship program to make college more affordable, and left a budget surplus. As senator, he stood up for Indiana workers by fighting China's unfair trade practices.

**Friend, if you agree that Evan is the right guy for Indiana, you can 't sit on the sidelines.** We're going to need every supporter on board to win this race.

So will you help me start the busy campaign season off on the right foot by getting us over tonight's goal? **[Please pitch in before midnight.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5046b/7be36b49/1ef6af59/78f88174/1148638305/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-august-eom2?refcode=20160831nd&amount=10")**

name: Sen. Barbara Mikulski
subject: so much a stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend -- One of the most frustrating things I hear is, "I don't need to donate to Chris - he's going to win".

**That's just the kind of attitude that gave Maryland a Republican Governor in 2014.**

Maryland Republicans told the press that they were going to do everything they could to elect Chris's opponent to the U.S. Senate. I don't know how you can hear that and not feel moved to jump in and ensure that Chris has the resources he needs to win in November.

We need Chris Van Hollen in the Senate fighting for Maryland and for each of us. He will be a champion for working families and a leader on so many important issues--as he has been in the House.

And we cannot win back a Democratic majority in the Senate without first holding this key Maryland seat. There's so much at stake here- there is no way we can afford to be complacent.

**[So, let me ask--will you chip in something right now to elect Chris to be Maryland's next U.S. Senator](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a10/70cdc2ba/47168847/3974eda/3542668577/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=e083016_1Re&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+So+let+me+askmdashwill+you+chip+in+somet&utm_campaign=em083016_1&source=em083016_1")** [DONATE NOW >>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a10/70cdc2ba/47168847/3974edb/3542668577/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=e083016_1Re&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+NOW+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em083016_1&source=em083016_1") Thank you,

Barbara A. Mikulski
U.S. Senator
Maryland

>

subject: 3 out of 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Last night was a tremendous night for our political revolution. Out of the five progressive primary campaigns we supported, three were victorious. But we did lose one, a big one, in Florida: Tim Canova against Debbie Wasserman Schultz.
As we move forward into the next chapter of our political revolution, we are going to win some elections, and we are going to lose some elections. But through it all, as Bernie said, our job is to transform the Democratic Party and this country. And it's our job to hold elected officials accountable when they work against the progressive values we all share.
During this race, Debbie Wasserman Schultz changed her position on a number of important issues, including fracking. And because of the challenge we gave her, you can expect a more fair and impartial Democratic National Committee in the next presidential primary.
Our involvement in all of the races we endorsed last night made us a better, stronger, and more progressive Democratic Party, and showed the continued power of our movement. These are the kind of challenges we're going to keep taking on, and it's why I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $2.70 to Our Revolution as a way of saying you are still in the fight Bernie started to transform the Democratic Party, and to transform our country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-victories?refcode=em160831-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-revolution-victories?refcode=em160831-full")
The three candidates who won last night -- Dwight Bullard in Florida, and Martin Quezada and Juan Mendez in Arizona -- join Zephyr Teachout, Pramila Jayapal, and other Our Revolution candidates who have already won their Democratic primaries.
And I know that if we continue to stand together and if we continue to organize in our communities, we are going to take our country back from the billionaire class.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: $1,000,000
body:
"I alone can fix it." | Derek --

Donald Trump emailed his supporters this weekend with some big fundraising news: He’s writing himself another check for $1 million to help meet his campaign’s goals for August.

This tactic works, Derek.

First of all, $1 million is a big deal, no matter the kind of campaign you're running. It's cash his supporters never need to contribute themselves. It’s the fundraising equivalent of “I alone can fix it.”

But it also makes the media take notice -- and drives coverage, which is also something his campaign can capitalize on. After this contribution, whenever his team asks for another donation or tries another tack, they are going to be even more successful.

So this news needs to motivate us as well, Derek.

**[On this team, we set serious goals and achieve them together, and as of right now, we are still more than $2 million away from hitting our August end-of-month target of $10 million. If you make your first donation and help us get there, we’ll send you a free sticker -- are you in?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzODkwNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDAxODE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Like it or not, Trump’s supporters are determined as ever to see him win.

Right now, I'm sure they’re stepping up like never before to match his personal contributions.

We can react to that in one of two ways: We can get frustrated -- or we can use this news to drive us.

**This team is stronger than Trump’s self-funding and last-minute blitzes. But now we’ve got to prove it, Derek. That’s why we set a huge $10 million goal, and that’s why we need to hit it before tonight at midnight:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzODkwNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDAxODE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our midnight fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzODkwNDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDAxODE4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I could really use your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
My work in government is guided by the values instilled in me by my parents, who devoted their lives to serving others. As a member of the State Board of Planned Parenthood, my mother defended a woman's right to access quality, affordable health care and control her own life.
From time to time when I was little, my father, a lifelong public servant, would ask us kids, "What are you going to do for freedom today?" He encouraged us to always try to make a difference in the world.
I first ran for the New Hampshire State Senate to make a difference and build a better life for our children. As a State Senator and Governor, I've fought to break down barriers for Granite Staters like my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, to be fully included in our society. I've worked to make sure my daughter Meg, and all our daughters, can reach their full potential regardless of their gender.
I'm running for the U.S. Senate because I'm tired of watching Washington vote to help corporate special interests instead of working to give our families a fair chance to succeed. Senator Ayotte's allies are spending millions of dollars against me to make sure she stays in Washington to maintain the status quo. **[Don't let them-- if you share my vision for an inclusive and equal society, please make a $3 contribution today, before our big August fundraising deadline. We've got a big $75,000 goal, and I could really use your help to get there.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd705/2a380d31/11b78c25/fa730a/77971564/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwODMxX0VPTS1NV0hfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160831_EOM-MWH_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for everything you do.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

I'm running for the U.S. Senate because I'm tired of watching Washington vote to help corporate special interests instead of working to give our families a fair chance to succeed. Senator Ayotte's allies are spending millions of dollars against me to make sure she stays in Washington to maintain the status quo. "" Thank you for everything you do. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Personal favor to ask
body:
My commitment to you | Derek, I have a personal favor to ask you: **[Will you chip in before midnight to help hit our end-of-month fundraising goal? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you for your support.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** We’re still $1.5 million away from our $10 million benchmark, and I’m counting on my best supporters like you to make up that shortfall.

I can’t promise you that your donation today will guarantee that we win this election.

But this is what I can promise:

I will never, ever stop fighting for you and those you love.

I’m in this race because I believe there’s more work we can do to make life better for all American families, to help you and your kids achieve your dreams -- whether that’s going to college, becoming a citizen, opening your own business, or even becoming president one day.

I’m going to fight for every last vote, and I need your help to do it. This is our final deadline like this before people begin to cast their ballots, so it’s more important than ever to make a strong showing and ensure our team has the resources it needs to reach as many voters as possible.

**Thank you for being someone I can count on, Derek. I appreciate you coming through today with whatever you can give:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our midnight fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzOTAyNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwMDE4MDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.

Patrick is up against Marco Rubio in Florida, one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. body:
Down to the wire, but I’m still matching until 11:59 PM TONIGHT! |

Peter, I’ve been writing matching checks all week for the wonderful contributions our supporters have made. And, Peter, I still have one ready for you if you make a contribution before the end-of-month FEC deadline in less than 2 hours. CONTRIBUTE $100 >> I'LL MATCH IT TO $200 CONTRIBUTE $65 >> I'LL MATCH IT TO $130 CONTRIBUTE $50 >> I'LL MATCH IT TO $100 CONTRIBUTE $25 >> I'LL MATCH IT TO $50 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT

Peter there’s a lot to do between now and Election Day. But the size of a fight never stopped us before. And I know you’re going to be there by my side till the very end. Because our country is hanging on by a thread -- we can’t afford four more years of Obama’s policies, and that’s what you’ll get with Hillary. I see the damage done every single day. Because I’m in this fight with you until the very end. Contribute before the end-of-month FEC deadline tonight at 11:59 PM and I’ll MATCH your contribution, up to $1 million.
